mnemonics.title: AVL Rotation Types
mnemonics.content: Left-Left: Right Rotate, Right-Right: Left Rotate, Left-Right: Left then Right, Right-Left: Right then Left

mnemonics.title: Red-Black Color Rules
mnemonics.content: Root is Black, No Red-Red parent-child, Equal Black Counts (EBC)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a balance scale showing ±1 weight difference
Picture alternating red/black nodes with equal black depth rulers

analogies.analogy: Like rebalancing a wobbly bookshelf by shifting weight
Traffic light system where red nodes must have green (black) neighbors
